nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Cave swallow
nodes.summary: Cave swallow（Cave swallow，学名 Petrochelidon fulva），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Cave swallows are found in Mexico and the Greater Antilles, with fall and winter vagrants reaching the east and Gulf Coasts of the U.S. Breeding colonies occur in south-eastern New Mexico, Texas, Florida, the Greater Antilles, portions of southern Mexico, and along the west coast of South America
